title: erucastrum virgatum subsp. baeticum
intro: Erucastrum virgatum subsp. baeticum, also known as Spanish rocket, is a plant species that belongs to the Brassicaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and protecting against oxidative stress. Erucastrum virgatum subsp. baeticum can be prepared as an herbal supplement, tea, or infusion, and is also used as a food ingredient in some traditional recipes.
